name: Autopilot Market Intel: Brand Mentions Logger

messages.content: Extract ONLY brand names from the text provided. Output as a comma-separated list. If no brands are found, output 'None'. No conversational text.

expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.subject: [SUCCESS] Weekly AI Brand Research - Data Logged

contents.text:
Halo Sandi,

Laporan mingguan untuk riset brand AI telah selesai diproses.
Total 200 entri data (20 prompt x 10 pengulangan) telah berhasil dicatat ke dalam Google Sheets secara otomatis.

Silakan cek file Google Sheets kamu untuk melihat hasilnya.

Jam Selesai: {{now}}
